name: KFC Big Bucket in the Sky Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 packages Lipton cup of tomato soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix dry ingredients together.
2. Place some of the mixture in a bag and add pieces of chicken, then shake.
3. Repeat step 2 again with the remaining mixture.
4. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
